tasks.title: Analyze Current Product
tasks.description: Examine the current project's source code and documentation. Identify existing features, architecture, and any limitations or missing capabilities that could be enhanced. Summarize findings in a markdown file named product_analysis.md and place it in target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Analyze Competitor: claudecode
tasks.description: Review the source code located at ../claude-code-sourcemap. Identify its core features, unique capabilities, UX patterns, and any advanced functionality not present in the current product. Document strengths, weaknesses, and noteworthy implementation details in competitor_ClaudeCode.md inside target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Analyze Competitor: copilot-cli
tasks.description: Inspect the copilot-cli repository (path provided by the user). Catalog its main features, command‑line interface design, integration points, and any innovative approaches. Write a concise analysis in competitor_CopilotCLI.md and store it in target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Analyze Competitor: OpenCode
tasks.description: Explore the source code at ../opencode. Determine key functionalities, tooling support, and any differentiating features compared to the current product. Summarize the analysis in competitor_OpenCode.md within target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Analyze Competitor: roocode
tasks.description: Examine the roocode project (source location provided by the user). Identify its major capabilities, workflow, and any advanced features that could inspire enhancements. Produce an analysis file named competitor_RooCode.md and place it in target/temp/swarmout.

tasks.title: Generate Feature Recommendation Document (SWARMOUT2.md)
tasks.description: Combine the insights from product_analysis.md and all competitor_*.md files. Propose concrete feature additions for the current product, referencing competitive gaps. Create a detailed implementation plan that includes Milestones and granular Tasks for each suggested feature. Write all of this into SWARMOUT2.md and save the file in target/temp/swarmout.
